description_long: This object is a large, monumental obelisk structure with a broad rectangular base and a sharply tapering, pyramid-like top. The obelisk features a series of evenly spaced, vertical ridges or grooves running up each face, giving it a ribbed appearance. The base is expansive and flat, extending outward on two sides, and appears to be integrated with a platform or plinth. The surface is uniformly light gray, suggesting it is made from concrete or stone, and there are no visible inscriptions or decorative motifs. The overall design is modern and geometric, with clean lines and a symmetrical layout. The structure is imposing and likely intended as a landmark or commemorative monument in an urban setting.
description: A large, modern obelisk with a ribbed, pyramid-like top and a broad, flat rectangular base, finished in uniform light gray. The structure is geometric and monumental, with no visible ornamentation.
description_view_0: The obelisk is seen from a diagonal angle, highlighting the ribbed pyramid top and the wide, flat base extending to the left.
description_view_1: A direct view of the obelisk's front, showing the symmetrical ridges and the central peak of the pyramid top.
description_view_2: The obelisk is viewed from the opposite diagonal, emphasizing the right side of the base and the sharp lines of the pyramid top.
description_view_3: A rear view of the obelisk, displaying the full length of the base and the back of the pyramid structure.
attribute_base_design: The base is a large, flat rectangular platform extending outward on two sides, with a smooth surface and no visible steps or decorative features. It appears to be constructed from the same material as the obelisk and is integrated seamlessly with the main structure.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is sharply pointed, forming a pyramid shape with clean, angular lines and no additional decoration or features.
